differential_diagnoses: Rheumatoid arthritis with secondary vasculitic neuropathy
ANCA-associated vasculitis (specifically polyarteritis nodosa or microscopic polyangiitis)
Multiple myeloma or monoclonal gammopathy-associated neuropathy
next_steps: Evaluate for inflammatory arthropathy: check Rheumatoid Factor, anti-CCP antibodies, ESR, and CRP
Perform sural nerve biopsy to rule out vasculitic neuropathy
Perform rheumatology consultation to evaluate for systemic inflammatory disease
Monitor response to pyridoxine supplementation and optimize pain management
Repeat neuroimaging or lumbar puncture for CSF analysis if cognitive symptoms persist after metabolic correction
Assess for occult malignancy given clinical decline and inflammatory symptoms
